title: neottia × veltmanii
intro: Neottia × veltmanii, also known as the Veltman's twayblade, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Neottia nidus-avis and Neottia ovata. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Neottia × veltmanii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, where it is used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
